executives.name: Rami Rahim
executives.background: Mr. Rahim has served as our Chief Executive Officer since November 2014. He has been with Juniper since 1997, serving in various roles including Executive Vice President and General Manager of the Development and Innovation organization.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Ken Miller
executives.background: Mr. Miller has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since February 2016. He joined Juniper in 1999 and has held various senior financial roles.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Chris Eldredge
executives.background: Mr. Eldredge has served as our Executive Vice President, Chief Customer Officer since January 2024. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Customer Operations.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Customer Officer

executives.name: Eva Andres
executives.background: Ms. Andres has served as our Chief Human Resources Officer since 2019. She previously held HR leadership roles at Virtustream and Dell EMC.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Chief Human Resources Officer

executives.name: Anne DelSanto
executives.background: Ms. DelSanto is a former Executive Vice President at Salesforce.com, Inc. She joined the board in 2021.

executives.name: Christine Gorjanc
executives.background: Ms. Gorjanc was the CFO of Arlo Technologies and Netgear.

executives.name: James Dolce
executives.background: Mr. Dolce is the CEO of Lookout, Inc. and has extensive experience in the networking industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive (Joined via acquisition of Unisphere Networks, Inc.)

executives.name: Janet Haugen
executives.background: Ms. Haugen was the CFO of Unisys Corporation.

executives.name: Kevin DeNuccio
executives.background: Mr. DeNuccio is the founder of Wild West Capital LLC and former CEO of Violin Memory.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Kevin Johnson
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Starbucks Corporation.

executives.name: Mercedes Johnson
executives.background: Mercedes Johnson has been a director since 2014. She was formerly the Senior Vice President and CFO of Avago Technologies Limited and CFO of Lam Research Corporation.

executives.name: Mitchell Gaynor
executives.background: Mr. Gaynor has served as our Chief Administration Officer since January 2023. He previously served as our Chief Legal Officer and Secretary from 2016 to 2023. Prior to Marvell, he was Executive Vice President and General Counsel at Juniper Networks.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary

executives.name: Robyn Denholm
executives.background: Robyn Denholm has been a member of the Board since August 2014 and served as Chair of the Board since November 2018. She has held executive roles at Telstra Corporation Limited and Juniper Networks, Inc.

executives.name: Stratton Sclavos
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of VeriSign, Inc. He is a seasoned executive with experience in cybersecurity and technology infrastructure.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Kriens
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kriens has served as Chairman of the Board since 1996. He served as our CEO from 1996 to 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Rami Rahim
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Rahim is the CEO of Juniper Networks and has been a director since 2014.
